response.overview: An ethereally comedic coming of age film with a dark twist. Two fresh high school graduate best friends Al & Bert, receive an experimental drug from their dealer. After taking it promptly, they experience a trip like no other, going on a sentimental journey of self discovery and facing the future. It's only after all the bonding that Al discovers that Bert has been dead the entire time.
response.title: Aeroplane Over the Sea
